hero.title: Backend engineering with operational focus
hero.subtitle: I design and ship resilient .NET systems with clean architecture, measurable quality gates, and fast rollback strategies.

summary.title: Production-first mindset
paragraphs: I work on API and backend domains where uptime, clear ownership, and maintainable boundaries matter as much as feature speed.
My process combines architecture discipline with practical delivery: contracts, telemetry, validation gates, and controlled release plans.
